Precondition: Both end effectors empty; black_cup_1 and black_cup_2 on top of green_box; glasses undisturbed.
Postcondition: Left end effector grasping black_cup_1; right end effector grasping black_cup_2; glasses undisturbed.

Precondition: Left end effector grasping black_cup_1; right end effector grasping black_cup_2; glasses undisturbed.
Postcondition: black_cup_1 and black_cup_2 placed on table; both end effectors empty; green_box top unblocked; glasses undisturbed.

Precondition: Both end effectors empty; green_box top unblocked; glasses undisturbed.
Postcondition: green_box grasped with dual-arm symmetric grasp; glasses undisturbed.
